title: Network Technician
description: We're seeking a Network Technician to help maintain and optimize Brex's infrastructure. You'll troubleshoot connectivity issues, monitor network performance, and contribute to infrastructure modernization.
responsibilities: Monitor and maintain network infrastructure across data centers and cloud environments
Troubleshoot connectivity issues and document root causes in incident tracking systems
Collaborate with infrastructure engineers to optimize routing configurations and performance
Respond to on-call alerts and provide support
Maintain accurate network documentation and runbooks
Assist with security audits and infrastructure optimization

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Competitive salary with annual equity grants
Flexible time off and work arrangements
